/etc/resolv.conf.content:
# Generated by NetworkManager
nameserver 8.8.8.8
nameserver 8.8.4.4
search example.com

/etc/os-release.content:
NAME="Polaris Linux"
VERSION="2.0 (Stellar)"
ID=polaris
ID_LIKE=debian
PRETTY_NAME="Polaris Linux 2.0 (Stellar)"
HOME_URL="https://polaris.dev"

/etc/fstab.content:
UUID=a1b2c3d4  /      ext4  defaults,noatime  0  1
tmpfs           /tmp   tmpfs defaults,nodev    0  0
